economic_notes: Nation operates equipment rental business through Tl'etinqox Government Economic Development LLP. Also operates Chilcotin River Trading Company LLP and Dechen Ventures LP. GBEs had total revenue of $7,299,879 and net earnings of $1,275,578 in 2024. Nation has investments in BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP. Capital projects include Rapid Start Housing, housing major renovations, Anaham Dam, biomass project, equine facility, greenhouse, and cultural centre feasibility.
notes: Audit opinion is QUALIFIED - auditor states 'basis for our qualified opinion' but the specific qualification matter is not explicitly described in the extracted text. Net financial assets figure of $15,915,451 is the end-of-year 2024 figure per the Statement of Changes in Net Financial Assets. GBEs accounted for using modified equity method include Tl'etinqox Government Economic Development LLP (99%), Tl'etinqox Government Economic Development Corp (100%), Dechen Ventures Ltd. (100%), and Chilcotin River Trading Company Ltd. (100%). Total government transfers calculated as ISC $12,195,679 + FNHA $2,043,608 + Province of BC $1,465,910 + FNESC $622,580 + CCATEC $26,683 + Government of Canada $916,049 + Drinking water settlement $4,000 + TNG $4,367,270 = $21,641,779; OSR = total revenue $26,481,870 minus government transfers $21,641,779 = $4,840,091. Expenses by segment from Schedule 1 used for program breakdown. No schedule of remuneration included in extracted statements. Budget figures noted as being based on 2022/2023 budget approved by Chief and Council.
